jurisdiction_name: Upper Scioto Valley Local Sd (Hardin Co.)
narrative:
Upper Scioto Valley Local Sd school district has 2,594 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
